questions.question: Explain the difference between OMP_SCHEDULE=static and OMP_SCHEDULE=dynamic. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: OMP_SCHEDULE=dynamic is more flexible but may lead to increased overhead.

questions.question: A parallel program using OMP_SCHEDULE=static has been implemented to perform a loop over an array of 1000 elements. If each element requires 10 milliseconds to process, what is the total processing time for the entire array?
questions.hint: Use the formula: Total time = Number of iterations * Time per iteration

questions.question: Compare the performance of a loop with OMP_SCHEDULE=static and one with OMP_SCHEDULE=dynamic, assuming the same number of threads and workload. What are the implications for the programmer?
questions.hint: Consider the potential trade-offs between overhead and flexibility.
